home.title: Wallace Bezerra | FullStack Developer
home.description: FullStack developer specialized in apps, websites and modern interfaces with React, React Native, Next.js and TypeScript.

profile.title: App and Website Developer
profile.description: I build apps and websites people enjoy using. I combine design, performance and well-structured code to turn ideas into clear, functional digital experiences.
profile.whatsappMessage: Hi, I would like to get in touch.

section.goalTitle: I HELP MOVE YOUR GOAL FORWARD
section.goalDescription: I develop attractive, intuitive interfaces designed to improve each product's usability.
section.solutionsDescription: Your website needs to work well on every screen. That is why I build responsive, fast experiences prepared for the digital world.
section.vscodeDescription: I keep up with new technologies and best practices to deliver more complete, modern and efficient projects.

tech.title: Technologies
tech.sideDescription: On the side are the technologies and frameworks I use to build modern digital products.
tech.belowDescription: Below are the technologies and frameworks I use to build modern digital products.

snapblend.title: SnapBlend App Landing Page
snapblend.description: Responsive landing page built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for the SnapBlend app, with multilingual support and a focus on creative photo editing and filters.

trut.title: Trut Custom Interiors Landing Page
trut.description: Landing page built with Next.js, refined design and visual effects that highlight the elegance of Trut's custom interior services.

storyplus.title: StoryPlus Web App
storyplus.description: Responsive web system with login, payment plans, favorites, niches and subniches, recent stickers and opacity and color adjustments.

trinity.title: Trinity AI Landing Page
trinity.description: Landing page about AI automations and chatbots, created to present Trinity AI's solutions with a modern and interactive design.

digitalBank.title: Digital Bank Landing Page
digitalBank.description: Landing page for a digital bank, with fluid animations and interactive elements that create an immersive experience.

bikcraft.title: Bikcraft Landing Page
bikcraft.description: Landing page for high-performance electric bicycles, with a clean, responsive design focused on product presentation.

homeyou.title: HomeYou Landing Page
homeyou.description: Elegant landing page for a real estate company, created to present properties in a modern and engaging way.

neon.title: Banco Neon Landing Page
neon.description: Landing page for a digital bank, with creative animations and professional design to highlight the brand's innovation.

blizzard.title: Blizzard Landing Page
blizzard.description: Landing page for one of the world's largest game developers, with immersive design and engaging animations.

miniblog.title: MiniBlog
miniblog.description: Application for creating and publishing posts, enabling interaction and sharing different kinds of content.

githubApi.title: GitHub API
githubApi.description: Project that uses the GitHub API to display detailed information about users and repositories.

about.title: About me
about.body1: Hi, my name is Wallace, I am {age} years old and I am a FullStack Developer focused on mobile and web applications. I have experience with React.js, React Native, Next.js, JavaScript, Node, TypeScript, Tailwind and other technologies. I enjoy creating reusable components and well-structured solutions.
about.body2: I am ready to take on new challenges and contribute solutions that combine clarity, performance and a good user experience.
